üìö Quick Reference
‚ùì Help & Tips
üëã Welcome to EOW Bhopal Dashboard
ý§Øý§πý§æý§Å office ý§ïý•á ý§∏ý§¨ records (Complaints, RC, PE, Court Cases, Pragati, Establishment etc.) ek hi jagah maintain hote hain.

üéØ Aap KYA Kar Sakte Hain

  • ‚úÖ Sab tabs me data dekh sakte hain
  • ‚úÖ Nayi entries (Complaint/RC/PE/Court Case etc) add kar sakte hain
  • ‚úÖ Existing entries edit kar sakte hain
  • ‚úÖ Reports / PDF generate kar sakte hain
  • ‚úÖ Search aur filters use kar sakte hain

üö´ Yeh sirf SP saab ke liye hai

  • ‚úó Delete koi bhi entry
  • ‚úó Avkash applications Approve/Reject
  • ‚úó Courts Master Manage
  • ‚úó Password reset
üí° Pro Tip:
Agar button nahi dikh raha, woh aapke role me available nahi hai. Normal hai, tension na lo.

üîó Links
Shareable form URLs
1. Nayi Complaint Add Karna
Complaints tab ‚Üí "+ Add" ‚Üí form fill ‚Üí Save
2. Court Case Add Karna
Court Cases ‚Üí "+ Add" ‚Üí Court choose ‚Üí Source Enquiry zaroor link karen ‚Üí Save
3. Specific Case Search
Tab kholen ‚Üí search bar me keyword (No, name, IO) type karen
4. Year-wise Filter
Tab me year sub-tabs (2024, 2025) par tap karen
5. Report Generate Karna
Reports tab ‚Üí Quick Preset YA manual filters ‚Üí üîç Preview ‚Üí üìÑ Export PDF
6. File Attach Karna
Case open karen ‚Üí Attachments section ‚Üí "+ Add File" ‚Üí PDF/Image select
7. Linked Enquiry Dekhna
Court Cases me "Related" column ‚Üí golden badge (C-15/24 ‚Üí) ‚Üí tap ‚Üí linked enquiry detail
8. Pragati History
Pragati Prativedan tab ‚Üí "üìä Case Timeline" button ‚Üí chronological history
Problem Solution
Login fail ho rahaPassword sahi type karen, internet check karen, sahi dropdown choose
Page load nahi ho rahaRefresh (Ctrl+R / Cmd+R), internet check, alag browser try
Save kaam nahi kar rahaRequired fields (*) sab bhare hain check, refresh, retry
Hindi text galat dikh rahaChrome / Safari use karen (latest version)
Search me result nahiPartial keyword try, spelling check
"Duplicate" errorSame No+Year combo exists. Verify ya different number
PDF generate nahi ho rahaBrowser settings me popup blocker disable karen
Account locked (5 wrong)10 min wait OR SP saab se reset karwaen
üîê Security Golden Rules:
  • Apna password KISI ke saath share NA karen
  • Public/shared computer pe logout zaroor karen
  • 5 wrong attempts ‚Üí 10 min lock automatic
  • Password leak ka shaq ‚Üí turant SP saab ko bataen
  • Login URL public WhatsApp groups me NA share karen
üì± Mobile Use ke liye:
  • Sirf apne personal phone par use karen
  • Public WiFi se sensitive data avoid karen
  • Screenshot share karte time PII (names, contact) hide karen
  • "Save Password" browser feature shared device pe USE NA karen
‚úÖ Logout Karna Bhool Gaye:
Top right me apna naam ke saath "Logout" button hai. Office se nikalte time, ya dusra koi computer use karne se pehle ‚Äî zaroor logout karen.
üí° Detailed PDF guide SP saab ne WhatsApp pe bheja hai

ý§Øý§π PIN staff ý§ïý•ã ý§¶ý•áý§Ç ‚Äî ý§áý§∏ý§∏ý•á ý§µý§π notice-tameel-form ý§Æý•áý§Ç login ý§ïý§∞ ý§Öý§™ý§®ý•á assigned notices ý§¶ý•áý§ñý•áý§óý§æý•§ ý§ñý§æý§≤ý•Ä ý§õý•ãý§°ý§ºý•áý§Ç ý§Øý§¶ý§ø ý§Øý§π staff ý§§ý§æý§Æý•Äý§≤ ý§®ý§πý•Äý§Ç ý§ïý§∞ý§§ý§æý•§
Live Calendar Sync
üìÜ Subscribe ‚Äî Apple Calendar / Google
üì≤
Subscribe karen ‚Üí sabhi directives ki deadlines apke Apple Calendar / Google Calendar me automatically appear hongi. Naye directives bhi auto-sync ho jaayenge. Smart reminders 1 din pehle + uss din 9 AM milenge.
üì± iPhone / iPad (Apple Calendar)
  1. Settings ‚Üí Calendar ‚Üí Accounts
  2. Add Account ‚Üí Other ‚Üí Add Subscribed Calendar
  3. Server me yeh URL paste karen:
  1. Next ‚Üí Save ‚Äî done!
üöÄ Direct subscribe (iPhone par tap karen)
üíª Mac (Calendar.app)
  1. Calendar app ‚Üí File ‚Üí New Calendar Subscription
  2. Yeh URL paste karen:
  1. Location: iCloud (sab devices par sync)
  2. Auto-refresh: Every 15 minutes
üåê Google Calendar
  1. Google Calendar ‚Üí Other calendars ‚Üí + ‚Üí From URL
  2. Upar wala HTTPS URL paste karen
  3. ‚öÝ Google calendar 12-24 ghante me refresh karta hai (slow)
‚öÝ Yeh feature kaam karne ke liye Edge Function deploy hona zaroori hai. Deployment guide: PHASE2-Calendar-Setup-Guide.md
